subject: MATHEMATICS
title: points, lines, line segments,
objective: parallel, perpendicular, and — recognize, using models, and draws a point, line, line segment, and ray.
introduction: Mathematicians, assemble! 📐 Today we're learning about: parallel, perpendicular, and 5. recognize, using models, and draws a point, line. Math isn't just numbers on paper — it's the language of the universe! Ready?

vocabulary.definition: Isang eksaktong lokasyon, tulad ng dulo ng lapis.
Isang tuwid na guhit na walang hangganan sa magkabilang dulo.
Bahagi ng linya na may dalawang dulo.
